member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown glossy wooden chair with a black upholstered seat cushion and carved curved legs and back; the chair appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m) and is partially occluded by a tabletop, with reflective varnished surfaces visible.

Partial close-up of a dark (black-brown) leather reclining couch showing two padded seats with vertical stitched channel backrests and a cushioned armrest; the right side is edge-cropped and a small dark object (possible remote or folded cloth) sits on the arm — estimated distance ~1.0 m from the camera.

Small dark-brown carved wooden side table with ornate legs and a lower shelf holding a folded patterned cloth; front and top surfaces are visible while the right edge is slightly cropped, finish appears glossy with small items on the tabletop; photographed fairly close to the camera (≈1.2 m).
clusters.representative_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown glossy wooden chair with a black upholstered seat cushion and carved curved legs and back; the chair appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m) and is partially occluded by a tabletop, with reflective varnished surfaces visible.

member_long_descriptions: Light-brown rectangular picture frame holding a white printed document or shipping label with black text and barcodes under glass; the frame fills most of the crop and is partially edge-cropped (top/right); photographed at close range (approx. 0.5 m).
clusters.representative_description: Light-brown rectangular picture frame holding a white printed document or shipping label with black text and barcodes under glass; the frame fills most of the crop and is partially edge-cropped (top/right); photographed at close range (approx. 0.5 m).

member_long_descriptions: Round wall-mounted clock with a glossy black fluted (scalloped) plastic or metal frame, white dial with bold dark Roman-style numerals and black hour and minute hands; the clock is slightly edge-cropped in the crop and appears photographed from about 1.2 m away.
clusters.representative_description: Round wall-mounted clock with a glossy black fluted (scalloped) plastic or metal frame, white dial with bold dark Roman-style numerals and black hour and minute hands; the clock is slightly edge-cropped in the crop and appears photographed from about 1.2 m away.

member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped multicolored floral rug with a blue border and red, white and yellow flower motifs on a textured woven/tufted pile, visible at the corner next to a hardwood floor; appears close to the camera (approx. 0.5 m away).
clusters.representative_description: Partial, edge-cropped multicolored floral rug with a blue border and red, white and yellow flower motifs on a textured woven/tufted pile, visible at the corner next to a hardwood floor; appears close to the camera (approx. 0.5 m away).

member_long_descriptions: Partial edge-cropped small beige low-pile area rug with muted floral motifs in pale green and brown; only the corner is visible against hardwood flooring and the weave appears slightly worn — visible portion suggests a small area rug, approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Partial edge-cropped rectangular woven rug with a muted blue, beige, tan and cream abstract wavy/floral pattern and narrow reddish-brown binding visible against a hardwood floor; appears to be a low-pile or flatweave on the floor about 1.0 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial edge-cropped small beige low-pile area rug with muted floral motifs in pale green and brown; only the corner is visible against hardwood flooring and the weave appears slightly worn — visible portion suggests a small area rug, approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Dark reddish-brown wooden chair back with carved, interlaced circular openwork and a glossy finish; the upper back is partially cropped by the image edge and shows some surface wear and darker discoloration — appears to be about 1.2 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Dark reddish-brown wooden chair back with carved, interlaced circular openwork and a glossy finish; the upper back is partially cropped by the image edge and shows some surface wear and darker discoloration — appears to be about 1.2 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: dark glossy wooden chair back edge-crop
member_long_descriptions: Partial, cropped close-up of a dark glossy wooden chair back showing multiple curved vertical slats with lighter worn highlights on the edges; lacquered finish appears reflective and the object is close to the camera (approx. 0.5 m).
clusters.representative_description: Partial, cropped close-up of a dark glossy wooden chair back showing multiple curved vertical slats with lighter worn highlights on the edges; lacquered finish appears reflective and the object is close to the camera (approx. 0.5 m).

member_long_descriptions: Dark mahogany rectangular dining table with a polished wood-grain top and rounded corners; front edge is partially occluded by carved wooden chairs and the crop cuts off parts of the table, viewed from close range (approximately 1.2 m).
clusters.representative_description: Dark mahogany rectangular dining table with a polished wood-grain top and rounded corners; front edge is partially occluded by carved wooden chairs and the crop cuts off parts of the table, viewed from close range (approximately 1.2 m).

member_descriptions: dark wooden slatted chair side crop
member_long_descriptions: Side view of a dark reddish-brown wooden dining chair with vertical slatted back and carved top rail; seat and lower stretcher are visible but the chair is partially cropped at the image edge and appears about 1.2 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Side view of a dark reddish-brown wooden dining chair with vertical slatted back and carved top rail; seat and lower stretcher are visible but the chair is partially cropped at the image edge and appears about 1.2 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Partial edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden dining chair showing a carved front leg, scalloped apron and patterned upholstered back at the right edge; glossy finish with shadowed lower area — appears about 0.8 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden dining chair showing a carved front leg, scalloped apron and patterned upholstered back at the right edge; glossy finish with shadowed lower area — appears about 0.8 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden cabinet showing a carved molding and raised-panel door with a small brass keyhole escutcheon and worn varnish; ornate vertical pilaster/detail visible at left — appears close to the camera, approximately 0.8 m away.
clusters.representative_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden cabinet showing a carved molding and raised-panel door with a small brass keyhole escutcheon and worn varnish; ornate vertical pilaster/detail visible at left — appears close to the camera, approximately 0.8 m away.

member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark reddish-brown wooden chair back with vertical slats and a slightly curved top rail; wood grain and a semi-gloss finish are visible and the piece appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).
clusters.representative_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark reddish-brown wooden chair back with vertical slats and a slightly curved top rail; wood grain and a semi-gloss finish are visible and the piece appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).

member_long_descriptions: Partial lower-side crop of an antique dark mahogany wooden cabinet base, showing two paneled doors with brass drop handles, three small upper drawers with decorative knobs, carved ornate feet and a glossy varnished finish with minor scuffing; appears about 1.2 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial lower-side crop of an antique dark mahogany wooden cabinet base, showing two paneled doors with brass drop handles, three small upper drawers with decorative knobs, carved ornate feet and a glossy varnished finish with minor scuffing; appears about 1.2 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped dark wooden chair back with a curved top rail and multiple vertical slats, glossy/dark-stained finish; a patterned fabric or coat with hanging fringe is draped over the lower area. Object appears close to the camera, approximately 0.6 m away.
clusters.representative_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark wooden chair back with a curved top rail and multiple vertical slats, glossy/dark-stained finish; a patterned fabric or coat with hanging fringe is draped over the lower area. Object appears close to the camera, approximately 0.6 m away.
